caption: A man in a dark suit and light-colored shirt stands at a podium in a dimly lit room, presenting to a large audience. He is positioned in front of a large white projection screen, with windows on either side. The audience consists of many people, mostly men, seen from behind; they are wearing a variety of casual and business-casual attire, including button-down shirts in colors like white, light blue, and green. In the foreground, a semi-transparent blue banner spans the width of the scene containing the white text "14 APRIL 2018 · NASHVILLE, TN" and "Trump's Economy: Boom Times or Dangerous Bubble?". The scene remains static across the sequence, with the speaker and the audience members remaining in their respective positions, maintaining a consistent view of the presentation setting.
